summary:
Agent2 believes the earliest safe method is through trans-vaginal sonography as it provides clear imaging at an earlier stage compared to other techniques or biochemical markers alone which become less reliable past certain milestones during pregnancy development.
The summary captures the essence of why Agent2 favors trans-vaginal sonography while keeping focus strictly on critical aspects related directly addressing how this technique enables accurate diagnoses relative timing concerns inherent within diagnosing pregnancies very early-on clinically speaking.
